name: INTERCAAT
description: Identify interface residues between protein chains in macromolecular complexes. Calculate atomic interactions and distances between query and interacting chains. Generate compatibility matrix showing interface residue interactions. Analyze protein-protein interfaces with customizable distance thresholds. Support for both single and multiple interacting chain analysis. Uses Voronoi tessellation for accurate interface detection.
capabilities: Identify interface residues between protein chains in macromolecular complexes
Calculate atomic interactions and distances between query and interacting chains
Generate compatibility matrix showing interface residue interactions
Analyze protein-protein interfaces with customizable distance thresholds
Support for both single and multiple interacting chain analysis
Uses Voronoi tessellation for accurate interface detection

complex_structure.description: Macromolecular complex structure in PDB format

query_chain.description: Chain ID of the query chain to analyze interface for

interacting_chains.description: Chain ID(s) of the interacting chain(s), comma-separated for multiple

distance_threshold.description: Distance threshold in Angstroms for interface residue detection
